target_objective: Implement Snapshot Caching for MCP Sessions in axis mcp serve to prevent redundant remote discoveries

plan_and_audit.description: Audit internal/mcp and internal/daemon to design snapshot caching keys and TTL limits
plan_and_audit.entry_gate: Verify workspace is clean on main branch
plan_and_audit.validation_gate: Define explicit cache key schema, TTL defaults, and file boundaries

implement_caching.description: Implement the thread-safe caching layer inside internal/mcp
implement_caching.validation_gate: Verify cache compiles and passes basic unit mocks

wire_mcp_handlers.description: Wire the cache layer into axis mcp serve tool handlers
wire_mcp_handlers.validation_gate: Verify axis mcp serve starts and responds correctly

verification_testing.description: Write integration tests simulating session requests and verify cache hits/misses
verification_testing.validation_gate: make test-race, make lint, and coverage gates pass
